mentions.note: 2,900-store convenience chain immune to oil price pressure; sells gasoline but crowd will like it; earnings after close.

S&P 500 entry validates story; up 166% since Sept 2023 rec at $278; fundamentals strong (24% earnings growth FY26) but valuation at 37x forward P/E and high gas prices ($112 barrel) limit new-money entry; long-term compounder for existing holders.
Dominates small-town America with breakfast pizza; reports after close. Results TBD.
At $865/share but dip was made to be bought. Build position incrementally — buy 25 shares now, add 10 on pullback targeting 50 shares total. Think of $865 as $86.50 on normalized pricing basis.
One of my absolute favorite companies; small-city convenience store model. Analyst day Wednesday could actually move the stock because people still don't know the Casey's story.
